title: Cam Bills Collection Reminder
description: Kiran and Madhav, As you are aware the current CAM balance receivables is Rs 1.2 Cr. We cannot continue like this . Ideally it should never be above Rs 50 lakhs to run operations smoothly. Else, we are doing Vendor payments drawing on OD and paying interest. Please follow up on the payments diligently. Need funds immediately as we want to go ahead with painting etc
